case_title: COVARRUBIAS, ANNA ELISA VS RICCARDI, LOUIS D., JR.

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,260.00 FILED BY RICCARDI, LOUIS D., JR. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT COVARRUBIAS, ANNA ELISA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
